document_type.description: Indicates the type or title of the exam or document, such as the subject or exam session.

exam_session.description: Specifies the session or part of the exam, such as '제3교시'.

general_instructions.description: Contains general instructions or notes applicable to the exam or questions, including assumptions and accounting standards to be used.

question_number.description: The number or identifier of the question.

question_text.description: The main text or body of the question, including any scenario or requirements.

question_additional_info.description: Any additional information, notes, or assumptions specific to the question.

question_table.description: Reference to a table id or description if the question includes a table. If multiple tables, concatenate or enumerate.

question_options.description: The list of answer options for the question, formatted as a string or enumerated list.

table_id.description: A unique identifier for the table, typically matching the document's table id.

table_title.description: The title or caption of the table, if present.

table_headers.description: The headers of the table, concatenated or as a comma-separated string.

table_rows.description: The rows of the table, formatted as a string or JSON array if further structure is required.
